content:
Jupiter in Gemini: Meaning, Traits & Crystals

Jupiter in Gemini blends the archetypal drive of Jupiter (where you grow, seek meaning, and find opportunity) with the Air, mutable nature of Gemini.

  • Planet: Jupiter — growth, expansion, belief, opportunity, wisdom
  • Sign: Gemini (Air/Mutable) — communication, curiosity, versatility, duality, learning

Eastern Perspective
